meta.desc: 2048 es un videojuego de rompecabezas. El objetivo es arrastrar fichas por una cuadrícula para combinar las del mismo valor y crear una ficha con el número 2048. Sin embargo, el jugador puede continuar jugando una vez alcanzado este objetivo para conseguir la mayor puntuación posible.

meta.name: Antcopter
meta.desc: Antcopter is a 2D platform game. You play as a little ant who can glide through the air. You have to collect 80 fruits on 20 different levels.

meta.name: Assemblio
meta.desc: The aim of the game is to complete the levels by producing the required items. It all starts with a Miner extracting items that are transported on belts to a Hub. On their way, the objects can be transformed with the help of machines.

meta.name: Break-It
meta.desc:
This is a little breakout clone that should be simple and familiar to play.
Cycle through the 5 levels to get the high score, but beware! The game speeds up each time around the loop!

meta.name: Dashy Dango
meta.desc: Help the Dango survive by fighting waves of enemies. Dash into enemies to eliminate them.

meta.name: disk-0 MADNESS
meta.desc:
Avoid enemies that have a different color than yours and absorb the ones with the same color as yours.
Trigger bombs to switch the enemies' color to yours!
Survive as long as possible. The game gets harder the longer you play, and the music adapts to the difficulty. You can gain a first extra life at 100.000 points, and more with more points :)

meta.name: Dodgeball
meta.desc: Remember the 5 D's of dodgeball: Dodge, duck, dip, dive and dodge.

meta.name: Don't Smash Into Obstacles
meta.desc: A submission to the WASM-4 game jam.
meta.genre: Plataformas / Corre y Salta con desplazamiento

meta.name: Endless Runner
meta.desc: Classic endless runner game featuring a jumping rectangle.
meta.genre: Plataformas / Corre y Salta con desplazamiento

meta.name: Explore the Grotto
meta.desc: This is a small adventure game made  in a week for the wasm4 gamejam.  Now go explore that grotto!

meta.name: First Flight
meta.desc: You're a young witch on her first flight. Take to the skies and see how fast you can collect the rings. Can you beat the high score?

meta.name: Future Avoid
meta.desc: Swing and remember to avoid future obstacles!

p: Fuzzy World Cup (World) (v1.0) (Damian Girardi, Sebastian Alvarez).zip
n: Fuzzy World Cup (World) (v1.0) (Damian Girardi, Sebastian Alvarez)

meta.name: Fuzzy World Cup
meta.desc: Penalty Soccer Game. You will be able to kick and keep penalties against the computer. To kick a penalty you can shoot to the center, left or right, you can choose a direction with the arrow buttons and press the X button to shoot, or just press the X button to shoot to the center of the soccer goal. To keep a penalty, choose a direction or stay in the center of the soccer goal before the computer kicks the penalty.

meta.name: HAMMER JOE
meta.desc: You've got a hammer to clobber ghosts and turtles like a certain plumber.

meta.name: Hills in the Moonlight
meta.desc: Ride your bike over hills and try to catch some air in the moonlight.

meta.name: It's Corn!
meta.desc: Use your combine to collect corn. Try to keep your corn-collecting streak going.

meta.name: Journey to Entorus
meta.desc: Prepare to die! You must make your way to Entorus, and maybe even make it back.

meta.name: Meteoroids
meta.desc: Use the gamepad buttons/arrow keys/mouse to move and shoot. Destroy and evade the meteoroids.

"The Knight" also missed the sunset a lot.

meta.name: Phantom Shift

Good luck, we're all counting on you.
